content: Guideword: FORM: PHRASAL-PREPOSITIONAL VERB, STRANDED PREPOSITION. CanDo: Can use verb + particle + preposition, where the preposition is separated from its complement. ► Prepositions
chinese_human_name: 三词短语动词：动词+小品词+介词（介词悬空结构）
examples: Anyway, let me tell you what ideas I came up with.、Sometimes in order to feel confident and to be inspired we need a person to look up to.、This you will have to look out for.、This shows her superficiality, which Kingshaw cannot put up with.、Firstly, let me express that the situation you describe is certainly not something my client could easily put up with.
trigger_lemmas: come up with、look up to、put up with、look out for
keywords: 三词短语动词,介词悬空,动词+小品词+介词,固定搭配,疑问句结构

content: Guideword: FORM: VERB + PRONOUN + PARTICLE. CanDo: Can use a wide range of phrasal verbs + object pronoun + particle.
chinese_human_name: 三词短语动词：动词+代词宾语+小品词
examples: [talking about a band] I went to check them out last week and here is my review of the two concerts.、[talking about a living room] I tried to clean it up as much as possible.、[talking about setting up an office phone system] We just need a small set and a little time to fix it up.
keywords: 短语动词,代词宾语,小品词,词序,固定搭配

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: VERBS OF SENSES + OBJECT + INFINITIVE. CanDo: Can use some verbs connected with the senses + direct object + infinitive without 'to' emphasising a complete action.
category: SuperCategory: VERBS. SubCategory: patterns_with to and -ing
chinese_human_name: 感官动词 + 宾语 + 不带to的不定式：强调完整动作
examples: I would like to see it develop without any pollution and without destroying the environment.、Nowadays, it is very common in Argentina to hear people talk about the economic depression.
keywords: 感官动词,不带to的不定式,完整动作,动词原形,宾语

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: ELLIPTED MODAL, HEDGING. CanDo: Can form alternative questions with two clauses and ellipsis in the second clause, often as a hedging device.
chinese_human_name: 省略情态动词的替代疑问句：作为委婉表达方式
examples: Maybe you could hand out toys or show a movie?、Maybe you will be able to arrange another excursion this year or provide more time there?
keywords: 替代疑问句,省略情态动词,委婉表达,协商语气,or连接

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: STRONG ALTERNATIVE. CanDo: Can form alternative questions using an extreme alternative to give greater pragmatic force.
chinese_human_name: 强对比选择疑问句：使用极端对立选项增强语用效果
examples: Is this new industry a blessing for the region or the exact opposite?
trigger_lemmas: or、the exact opposite、a blessing or a curse
keywords: 选择疑问句,极端对立,语用效果,or连接,正式语境

content: Guideword: FORM: TAGS WITH 'THERE' + 'BE'. CanDo: Can use affirmative and negative forms of question tags with 'there' + 'be'.
chinese_human_name: 存在句反意疑问句：there be 结构的附加疑问
examples: As you put it that way, there isn't much of a difference with our time, is there?、But there is always something you can improve, isn't there?
keywords: 反意疑问句,存在句,there be,附加疑问,一致性

content: Guideword: USE: FOCUS. CanDo: Can use 'wh-'questions as a focusing device, often in a narrative or argument.
chinese_human_name: wh-疑问句作为焦点强调手段
examples: Nevertheless, we still give presents because we really want to. You can recognize them normally very fast! They are the ones which are unexpected and made with lots of love. So what makes a good present? From my point of view, the best presents are personal and fitted to the individual. (Germany; C1 EFFECTIVE OPERATIONAL PROFICIENCY; 2008; German; Pass、The other very serious problem in connection with cars is pollution, which is the cause of more diseases and problems than we realise at the moment. But what are the alternatives? Berlin has a well-structured and functioning subway…、Some of them are coin operated but some are magnetic-card operated. Use these coin-operated ones because to call from the other ones, you should buy a magnetic card, which is only possible in post offices. What else can I tell you? If you want anything to drink or to eat after your arrival, there are restaurants at the airport. (Poland; C1 EFFECTIVE OPERATIONAL PROFICIENCY; 1993; Polish; Pass
keywords: wh-疑问句,焦点强调,叙事技巧,论证手段,修辞手法

content: Guideword: FORM: 'OURS' AS SUBJECT. CanDo: Can use the possessive pronoun 'ours', in subject position.
chinese_human_name: 物主代词'ours'作主语：高级用法解析
examples: I hope that other councils will consider improving the cyclists' cycling conditions as ours did.、Yes, of course there are much larger gardens in this area, but ours is more than four times as big as the one we had in Holland.、What is more, the manager organises excursions to London. Ours was breathtaking. We visited unbelievably interesting museums…
keywords: 物主代词,主语位置,替代功能,比较结构,避免重复

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: (SUBJECT) 'IT' + PASSIVE. CanDo: Can use 'it' with the passive voice where the subject is unknown or unimportant, often in formal contexts. ► passives
chinese_human_name: 形式主语'it'与被动语态的搭配：用于未知或不重要主语
examples: It was considered to be the most important thing to supply every computer with Internet and E-mail access、It is hoped that this report will help the club to improve and meet the needs of the whole school.、Firstly it was highlighted that so many people take advantage of the park, but our survey clearly contradicts this view.
trigger_lemmas: it is believed、it was reported、it is considered、it is hoped
keywords: 形式主语it,被动语态,that从句,正式语境,未知主语

content: Guideword: FORM: 'THAT OF', 'THOSE OF'. CanDo: Can use 'that of' and 'those of' as a possessive form, in formal and professional contexts.
chinese_human_name: 正式场合所有格表达：that of 与 those of 的用法
examples: It is widely known that the Russian educational system differs dramatically from that of the European, Asian or American countries.、The strength of our product is that it fits the customers' demands - especially those of middle-aged single consumers.、Therefore, I urge you to publish this letter and reconsider your opinions, which clearly do not reflect those of the general population.
keywords: that of,those of,所有格,正式表达,避免重复

content: Guideword: FORM: 'NONE', SUBSTITUTION. CanDo: Can use pronouns 'none' to substitute for subject and object pronouns. ►  pronouns: substitution
chinese_human_name: 代词none的替代用法：替代主语和宾语
examples: As for disadvantages, in fact, I see none.、As for social life organized by the school, there was none .、The costs saved without external consultants would be higher than the costs for this course . Opportunity costs: None.、I started learning the language when I was seven. Problems when using English? None.
trigger_lemmas: none of、there is none、see none、have none
keywords: 代词none,替代用法,主语替代,宾语替代,否定含义

content: Guideword: USE: FORMAL. CanDo: Can use 'few', 'many', 'most', 'others' to refer to people in formal written contexts, often reports or surveys.
chinese_human_name: 正式书面语中表示人群数量的代词：few, many, most, others
examples: Few people stop to think about what they are really doing, and few are motivated to work at all.、Few denied that it was one of the most thrilling and fascinating activities we tried the whole week.、Many express their satisfaction and claim to have acquired a great number of new skills.、Many say that extreme sports attract only those who are addicted to adrenaline or those who have nothing to lose.、Some of the students have a few comments. Most were concerned with the planning of the timetable and I hope there may be some changes this year.
trigger_lemmas: few people、many say、most of the、others were
keywords: 数量代词,正式书面语,人群指代,few,many,most,others,报告语境

content: Guideword: FORM: RELATIVE PRONOUNS. CanDo: Can use 'some of', 'many of' to modify relative pronouns in a relative clause.
chinese_human_name: 关系代词修饰：some of/many of + which/whom
examples: The people of his time were amazed every time they saw his new inventions, some of which were enormous.、By and large, how we eat is influenced by several factors, some of which have nothing to do with your nationality.、I am aware that you have a different view on young people's preferences, but I hope this event could give you an opportunity to see some other aspects of young people, some of whom are very active in sports in our club.、Today we continue this tradition by organising lectures and exhibitions, generally open to the public, many of which deal with Hamburg-specific issues.
keywords: 关系代词,some of,many of,which,whom

content: Guideword: FORM: MODIFIED. CanDo: Can modify 'few' and 'many' with 'very', 'too', 'so' as intensifiers.
chinese_human_name: 数量代词强化：用very、too、so修饰few和many
examples: It was on Thursday that I realized how many children were in the centre. There were too many and the day was extremely tiring.、Almost 5000 Greeks died that night, and very few managed to survive.、In recent years, the Internet, which used to be a luxury only used by the very few who had access to it, has become a means of exchanging information.、Sure, some of the motorists changed to bicycles or to public transport - but far too few.
keywords: 数量代词,强化词,few,many,very too so

content: Guideword: FORM: 'NONE'. CanDo: Can use 'none' as a pronoun. ►  determiners: quantity  ►  pronouns: quantity
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: substitution, one, ones, none
chinese_human_name: 代词none的用法：表示“没有”或“全无”
examples: Then I searched for a Coca-Cola, but I found none.、Although I was really disappointed, I managed to keep the presence of mind and think more carefully and calmly. The result? None!、We expected a social programme but there was none.、The odd thing about snowboarding in Russia ... is that there are very few mountains. In fact, there are none.、The costs saved without external consultants would be higher than the costs for this course. Opportunity costs: None.
trigger_lemmas: none of、find none、there is none、expect none
keywords: none,代词,否定,数量,none of

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'ANYTHING', ELLIPSIS. CanDo: Can use 'anything' in an ellipted clause, ('if there is anything …').
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: indefinite - thing, -one, -body etc
chinese_human_name: 不定代词anything在省略从句中的用法
examples: Anything else you need, ask Sarah.、Anything you need in connection with my report, please don't hesitate to contact me.、Anything you want to ask me, feel free to do so.
trigger_lemmas: anything else、anything you need、anything in connection with
keywords: 不定代词,省略从句,条件句,anything else,非正式语境

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'ANYTHING', FOCUS. CanDo: Can use 'anything' with post-modifiers to form complex noun phrases as subjects with a singular verb, to give focus.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: indefinite - thing, -one, -body etc
chinese_human_name: 不定代词anything的后置修饰：复杂名词短语作主语
examples: Anything else can be attached too if needed.、Anything to show how happy you are for them will do.、Anything that puts you in contact with the English language is important.
keywords: 不定代词,后置修饰,复杂名词短语,单数动词,焦点强调

content: Guideword: FORM: 'EACH …' + 'THE OTHER(S)', AS COMPLEMENT. CanDo: Can use 'each' (+ noun or pronoun) as subject followed by 'the other(s)' a complement of a preposition, to refer to two related things. ► pronouns: quantity
chinese_human_name: 相互代词结构：'each ... the other(s)' 作介词补语
examples: Each person could be a help to the other.、They all seem to mean exactly the same but if you study them more carefully, you realize that each of them differs from the others in tiny details that can be relevant.、Generally speaking, each individual is different from the others.
keywords: 相互代词,each,the other,the others,介词补语,相互关系,主谓一致

content: Guideword: USE: RHETORICAL QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use question forms to ask rhetorical questions.
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时修辞疑问句：表达观点与强调
examples: [writing about fashion] Are we becoming shallow?、Why is technology taking over our lives?、Why am I explaining all this? The only reason is that I want to show that young people are interested in sports.
keywords: 修辞疑问句,现在进行时,表达观点,强调现象,疑问词

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: NEGATIVE QUESTIONS, PERSUASION. CanDo: Can use the negative question form as a persuasion strategy.
chinese_human_name: 否定疑问句用于劝说：Don't you...? 的劝说策略
examples: Don't you just hate taking the bus to school every morning? well I have a perfect solution for you, a great bike with good brakes, a bell and lights. it is a great bike but since I never use it I would be happy to sell it to you.、Don't you find that when you are having a shower or bath, you occasionally run out of water?
keywords: 否定疑问句,劝说策略,共同感受,现在时,句型结构

content: Guideword: USE: REPORTING VERBS. CanDo: Can use the present simple with a wide range of reporting verbs, especially in academic contexts, including 'demonstrate', 'illustrate'.
chinese_human_name: 一般现在时与报告动词搭配：学术语境中的demonstrate、illustrate等
examples: The popularity of this TV game in Russia clearly demonstrates the nature of human fears and dreams.、The 2 charts illustrate the number of employees, and the trends in profit for three factories, namely the factories located in London, Leeds, and Bristol, which belong to the same company, during the year 2003.
keywords: 报告动词,一般现在时,学术语境,客观陈述,第三人称单数

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: NEGATIVE QUESTIONS, OPINION. CanDo: Can use the negative question form to check opinions.
chinese_human_name: 现在时否定疑问句：用于确认观点
examples: Doesn’t it sound fascinating?、Don't we all like presents?、Don't you think that fashion always looks funny if it is not the fashion of today?
trigger_lemmas: don't you think、doesn't it sound、don't we all
keywords: 否定疑问句,现在时,确认观点,助动词否定形式,don't you think

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: FORMAL. CanDo: Can use less frequent complex prepositions, often in a more formal, literary or business context.
chinese_human_name: 复杂介词：正式语境中的低频复合介词
examples: It's unbelievable that this civilization that lived a long time ago could be so ahead of their time.、I think that the next area to develop will be the car industry, which will develop cars that are going to work by solar energy, on account of the levels of pollution in big cities.
trigger_lemmas: on account of、in spite of、with a view to、by means of
keywords: 复杂介词,正式语境,低频,固定搭配,逻辑关系

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: INVERSION, IMAGINED PAST. CanDo: Can invert the subject and affirmative auxiliary verb to talk about imagined situations in the past, often with regret, in formal contexts.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时倒装：表达对过去想象的假设与遗憾
examples: Had I known the tour would be so bad, I wouldn't have booked it.、Had they been new people, travellers from other countries, I could have taken it, but all the customers were English!、Sometimes I think that had I gone to Britain without this experience, my life would have been different.
keywords: 过去完成时倒装,虚拟语气,正式语境,假设条件,遗憾表达

content: Guideword: FORM: INVERSION WITH 'NOT ONLY … BUT ALSO'. CanDo: Can use the inverted form of the past simple with auxiliary 'do', in the phrase 'not only … but also'.
chinese_human_name: 过去时倒装结构：not only … but also
examples: The companies I found at the trade fair were very varied. Not only did I find high-technology companies, but also shoemakers, advertisement companies and plane manufacturers to name but a few.、Not only didn't we travel 5000 miles in 30 days, as you had advertised, but also we stayed 8 days in just one place, which had nothing interesting to see except a church.、Not only didn't I learn any new grammar but also I couldn't enrich my vocabulary.
keywords: 倒装,not only,but also,过去时,助动词

content: Guideword: USE: FOR EMPHASIS, WITH 'DID'. CanDo: Can use the past simple with 'did' for emphasis.
chinese_human_name: 过去简单时强调用法：用'did'加强语气
examples: We did reach the target figure and we have sent about 85 percent of the money to the hospital.、[in a letter defending the organisation of an event] We did have 34 games and one stall with beverages and snacks.、It is true that it did rain during the day but it was not a "sudden downpour",  as you wrote. It was more a small shower …
keywords: 过去简单时,强调语气,did强调,动词原形,事实澄清

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'yes/no', 'wh-', tag and negative question forms with a wide range of verbs.  ► Questions
chinese_human_name: 过去时疑问句：一般过去时的疑问形式
examples: Did you spot the fact that what is expected from us in Tall Trees Campsite is to help in organising the entertainment?、How did it turn out then?、I told you about Peter and Mary, didn't I?、Didn't we all dream of being famous once in our lives?
keywords: 一般过去时,疑问句,did,动词原形,反意疑问句

content: Guideword: USE: COMPLEX ORDERING OF PAST EVENTS. CanDo: Can use the past simple to order sequences of events in the past in a complex way.
chinese_human_name: 过去简单时：复杂事件排序
examples: Following advice from a friend, I purchased the English version of your product, only to find out its quality did not match the promises made in your advertisement.、After having discussed this subject with the other member, we came up with the following decisions. First of all …
keywords: 过去简单时,事件排序,时间状语,连词,叙述连贯性

content: Guideword: USE: POLITENESS: 'I THOUGHT'. CanDo: Can use the past simple 'I thought' as a politeness structure to sound less direct.
chinese_human_name: 礼貌表达：过去式'I thought'的委婉用法
examples: I understand you are quite concerned about the matter and I thought it would be a good idea to let you know what is really going on.、The reason why I'm writing to you is that I thought you might be interested in writing about a special dish from your country for the international cookbook.
trigger_lemmas: i thought、thought it would、thought you might
keywords: 礼貌表达,委婉语气,过去式,I thought,句型结构

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the full negative forms with a wide range of verbs, often in formal contexts.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时否定式：正式语境中的全面否定表达
examples: Thus, you have not fulfilled your task with due care, as you have stated in your letter.、Somehow, in my country education has not evolved, although it manages to maintain some advantages.
keywords: 现在完成时,否定式,正式语境,过去分词,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: NON-FINITE CLAUSES. CanDo: Can use a passive non-finite '-ing' form as a subordinate clause or a noun clause to give explanatory background information.
chinese_human_name: 被动非谓语-ing形式：作解释性背景信息的从句或名词从句
examples: Being born and raised in Mexico, I believe her to be this country's best representative to the world.、Being overworked and badly paid, Polish women are torn between their dreams and their real possibilities.、Being invited by your boss for an unexpected lunch makes you feel noticed.
keywords: 被动非谓语,-ing形式,从属从句,名词从句,背景信息

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: PRESENT CONTINUOUS NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the present continuous passive negative form to refer to ongoing situations in the present.
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时被动语态否定式：表示当前未持续进行的被动动作
examples: In my opinion, the store is not being promoted enough.、Women are not being seen as just inferior to men and incapable of working outside the home.、Finally, I agree with the fact that mobile phones have helped the human species develop, but as long as they 're not being used in a sensible way, they're a destructive weapon against children's health.
trigger_lemmas: not being promoted、not being seen、not being used
keywords: 现在进行时被动语态,否定式,未持续进行,被动动作,当前情况

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: SUMMARISING, EVALUATING WITH 'IT'.. CanDo: Can use the passive with 'it' as a dummy subject, to summarise or evaluate in discussions, usually in formal or academic writing.
chinese_human_name: 被动语态：形式化总结与评价的'it'作形式主语用法
examples: To sum up, it can be concluded that this report has attempted to summarize the main points regarding the Spanish educational system.、In addition, it has been found that some products were difficult to find.
trigger_lemmas: it can be concluded、it has been found、it is suggested、it was reported
keywords: 被动语态,形式主语,it,that从句,总结评价

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'GET' + OBJECT + '-ED'. CanDo: Can use 'get' + object + '-ed' to talk about causing or instructing something to happen or to be done by somebody else, often informally.
category: SuperCategory: PASSIVES. SubCategory: get and have
chinese_human_name: 非正式使役结构：get + 宾语 + -ed分词
examples: I must say that Caroline and I are good together because I think I am a little bit lazy but she is always the one who tries to get things done .、[talking about a minibus] … ours broke down and it took hours to get it repaired .、But within the last two months we received several complaints from our customers about not getting their orders delivered in time.
keywords: 使役结构,非正式表达,get + 宾语 + -ed,安排他人完成,过去分词

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'GET' + OBJECT + '-ING'. CanDo: Can use 'get' + object + '-ing' to talk about causing someone or something to do something.
category: SuperCategory: PASSIVES. SubCategory: get and have
chinese_human_name: 使役结构：get + 宾语 + -ing 形式
examples: First of all, I would like to underline the sheer boredom of these CDs, which got me yawning from the very first minute.、I was very happy when I received your letter, although I must say that your dilemma got me thinking.、As soon as they realized there was no way to get the employees moving, they got excited and nervous.、But still both concerts were great as Elton John and "Metallica" really know how to get people moving, but in two completely different ways.
keywords: 使役结构,get + 宾语 + -ing,促使动作,间接引发,现在分词

content: Guideword: FORM: NOUN PHRASE WITH POSSESSIVE 'S WITHOUT NOUN. CanDo: Can form complex noun phrases with noun phrase + 'of' + noun phrase + possessive determiner ''s', omitting the noun where it is previously mentioned.
chinese_human_name: 名词短语：省略名词的所有格's结构
examples: Our after-sales team now is perceived as faster, more qualified, friendlier and more efficient than our competitors’.、You cannot have peace and quiet in your own home, as your hour of peacefulness might considerably differ from your neighbours’.、I think it would be better to include a student's view of the college, not only a teacher's.
keywords: 名词短语,所有格's,省略名词,比较结构,避免重复

content: Guideword: USE: NOMINALISATION, FORMALITY. CanDo: Can use nominalised forms in academic or business contexts, to make something more formal.
chinese_human_name: 名词化结构在正式语境中的应用：学术与商务写作
examples: As indicated by the charts, the output in state-owned industry increased by 12% in 2000.、With reference to foreign-invested industry, it recorded fluctuations in industrial output increases throughout three years.、It stood at 14% in 2002, then dropped by 2% in 2001. 2002 brought a significant growth in the output and recorded 19%.、We could say that things have been altered by the advances of science and culture in general, like the rest of the world.
trigger_lemmas: with reference to、as indicated by、it is recorded、increase in、analysis of
keywords: 名词化,正式语境,学术写作,商务报告,介词搭配

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'WH-' CLEFT, FOCUS. CanDo: Can form complex noun phrases with 'wh-' cleft clauses, followed by 'be', to give focus.
chinese_human_name: 名词短语：'wh-' 分裂句结构（强调焦点）
examples: What everyone loved were the special effects and we were very impressed by the use of advanced technological innovations.、What companies care about is money and football players help them to earn it.、What tourists want is to see the most typical things in England, not a hamburger restaurant.、What students learn are mostly facts and theories.
keywords: wh- 分裂句,强调焦点,名词短语,be 动词一致性,高级语法结构

content: Guideword: FORM'-ING' FORMS, ABSTRACT NOUNS. CanDo: Can use the '-ing' form of verbs as abstract nouns.
chinese_human_name: 动词-ing形式作抽象名词：Learning、Teaching、Advertising等用法
examples: Learning English has its rewards too.、Advertising seems to be very important to promote a new product.、Teaching is terribly challenging and demanding.
keywords: 动名词,抽象名词,-ing形式,活动概念,主语宾语

content: Guideword: FORM: UNCOUNTABLE NOUNS. CanDo: Can use a wide range of uncountable nouns, particularly referring to abstract concepts.
chinese_human_name: 不可数名词：抽象概念的高级用法
examples: I appreciate that your company is concerned about safety and has installed safety belts in every coach but they do not help much when they are all broken.、Above all, the administration is not very efficient.、He will go with another two members in his department who are likely to be the core workforce and who are eager to broaden their vision.、Through that we can develop more humanity, solidarity, tolerance and respect among people of different countries.
keywords: 不可数名词,抽象概念,量词修饰,单数谓语,固定搭配

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'WHATSOEVER', EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can use 'whatsoever' after a negative form for emphasis.
chinese_human_name: 否定强调词：whatsoever的用法
examples: This means that nothing shall change for the employees, there shall be no implication whatsoever for their rights stipulated in their employment contracts.、Organising the entertainment would be rather fun, whilst waiting tables would be boring and we have no experience whatsoever.
keywords: whatsoever,否定强调,正式英语,绝对否定,副词

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'NOT ONLY … (BUT) ALSO' WITH INVERSION. CanDo: Can use auxiliary 'do' + inverted subject after 'not only', to give focus.
chinese_human_name: 倒装结构：Not only ... (but) also 的强调用法
examples: Not only was it in a wonderful location, with extraordinary views, but it was also very accessible and the shops were really near.、Not only do they have the biggest turnover overall, they also managed to increase it constantly from 2000 to 2002.
keywords: 倒装,强调结构,并列信息,正式语体,焦点增强

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'NOT' + STANCE ADVERB, HEDGING. CanDo: Can use 'not' + stance adverb, often  in a mid position, to soften the directness of a statement.
chinese_human_name: 否定词not与立场副词的搭配：缓和语气表达
examples: This is not necessarily the way the older generation would see it, though.、Being a passionate student of the English language, you do not necessarily need a teacher to guide you through the meanders of English.、I'm not sure what exactly they would expect us to do at the campsite, but organising the entertainment is not really my thing.、Personally, I do not actually think that this relationship will change.
keywords: 否定,立场副词,语气缓和,委婉表达,not necessarily

content: Guideword: FORM: 'NONE', SUBSTITUTION. CanDo: Can use negative pronoun 'none' to substitute for subject and object pronouns or noun phrases. ► pronouns: substitution
chinese_human_name: 否定代词 'none' 的替代用法：主语与宾语替换
examples: In fact, there are none, but the hills that do exist can be dubbed mountains - just because there are none...、Concerning your question about any special requirements of some students - I am glad that I am able to tell you that there are none this year.、Problems when using English? None.
keywords: 否定代词,替代用法,主语替换,宾语替换,none of

content: Guideword: FORM: 'NOT ALL', 'NOT EVERY'. CanDo: Can use 'not with indefinite pronouns 'everyone' and 'everything' and determiners 'every', 'all'.
chinese_human_name: 部分否定表达：'not all'与'not every'的用法
examples: Not everyone likes sports or music.、Not everything was as good as we expected.、Not all students, though, can attend the centre as it is not always open, and their lessons finish at 5 pm, the closing time of the centre.、Not all of us have got the fighting spirit to visit the gym regularly, but many of us would like to have a healthy look.、Not every cyclist is a danger to the public as most of them obey all rules and respect other road users.
keywords: 部分否定,不定代词,限定词,not all,not every

content: Guideword: USE: FORMAL. CanDo: Can use '(very) few' meaning 'not many' to refer to people in formal written contexts, often reports or surveys.
chinese_human_name: 正式书面语中的否定表达：用'(very) few'表示'not many'指人
examples: They were sent to Britain to improve their English but few had any real contact with the language.、English is the most spoken language nowadays and although most of the people can speak a bit of English, very few speak it in the right way.、The Greeks have always been a tortured folk; everyone tried to conquer them, but few managed.
keywords: few,very few,not many,正式书面语,指代人

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: MODIFYING ADJECTIVES, EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can modify adjectives with adverbs, often for emphasis.
chinese_human_name: 副词修饰形容词：强调表达
examples: It is painfully obvious that it will rescue our city from the pollution and fumes that cars are producing.、[talking about stolen goods] It is highly unlikely that the goods can vanish from your warehouse without that being noticed.
keywords: 副词修饰形容词,强调表达,程度副词,方式副词,固定搭配

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: MODIFYING ADJECTIVES, HEDGING. CanDo: Can modify adjectives with degree adverbs, often to make an assertion less direct.
chinese_human_name: 程度副词修饰形容词：缓和语气表达
examples: If you want to come earlier or if there's a public transport strike (which is quite probable), you will have to take a taxi.、It is almost certain that we'll have fights in the future but we will probably overcome them.
keywords: 程度副词,形容词修饰,缓和语气,概率表达,正式语境

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use a wide range of adverbs with 'can' in the normal mid position after the modal verb). ► adverbs
chinese_human_name: 情态动词can与副词搭配：副词在can后的中间位置
examples: Only those who live with their relatives can fully understand how essential is the role of your parents, sisters, aunts...、Miss Sylvia Ann Powers is a good friend of mine for over six years, so I can honestly say that I know her personality fairly well.
keywords: 情态动词can,副词中间位置,程度副词,方式副词,can fully understand

content: Guideword: USE: EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can use expressions with 'can' or 'can’t' to give focus or add emphasis, such as 'as you can see', 'I can't say', 'I can tell you that', 'as you can imagine', 'I can say that', 'I can assure you that'.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词can的强调用法：as you can see, I can tell you that等表达
examples: So, as you can see, there are no serious consequences for us, so far.、I can't say I was very impressed with the level and the way the classes were given.、About my country, I can tell you that we went through a great number of wars in the last century…
trigger_lemmas: as you can see、i can tell you that、i can't say、as you can imagine
keywords: 情态动词,强调用法,固定搭配,插入语,语气增强

content: Guideword: FORM: PASSIVE. CanDo: Can use 'can' in passive reporting clauses in a more formal impersonal style (e.g. for reports and academic contexts), such as 'It can be said that', 'It can be argued (that)', 'It can be concluded that', 'It can be considered'.► passives
chinese_human_name: 被动报告从句中的can：正式文体中的客观表达
examples: It can be argued, looking at the figures, that the company should consider withdrawing from the heater market.、Taking everything into account, it can be concluded that the current training course is very useful for our company.、As for marriage and relationships, it can be said that women who have a job, nowadays, do not quit it after marriage.
trigger_lemmas: it can be argued、it can be said、it can be concluded、it can be considered
keywords: 被动语态,报告从句,正式文体,客观表达,It can be argued that

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: PAST NEGATIVE, DEDUCTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'can't' or 'cannot have' + '-ed' to make deductions.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词can的过去否定推测用法：can't/cannot have + 过去分词
examples: I live with my partner and we can't have used so much electricity.、…it cannot have been such a disappointment.、The air-conditioning cannot have been working properly as the coach was too cold.
trigger_lemmas: can't have、cannot have、can't have been、cannot have been
keywords: 情态动词,否定推测,过去事件,逻辑推断,cannot have + 过去分词

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'I DARE SAY'. CanDo: Can use the fixed expression 'I dare say' to say that something is probably true.
chinese_human_name: 固定表达：I dare say
examples: I feel that I have a huge responsibility trying to choose only one option, but I dare say that the last option may be the best one.、I must express my concern about some facilities, like the student study centre and the canteen, which I dare say needs improvement.
trigger_lemmas: i dare say、dare say、i dare say that
keywords: 固定表达,可能性,推测,委婉语气,that 从句

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTION. CanDo: Can use the question form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词dare的疑问句形式：dare we/you/they...?
examples: Dare we run the risk of even one child or adult turning to violent crime because they think it is ok?
trigger_lemmas: dare we、dare you、dare they、run the risk
keywords: 情态动词,疑问句形式,dare,动词原形,修辞疑问

content: Guideword: USE: 'HOW DARE …!'. CanDo: Can use 'how dare … !' to express disapproval or offense about something
chinese_human_name: 情态动词短语：how dare …! 表达强烈不满
examples: How dare people say that we don't practice sport!、… how dare you say that this event was a complete failure!
keywords: how dare,情态动词,表达不满,固定短语,强烈语气

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: HEDGING. CanDo: Can use 'be' + 'not' + adjective + 'that-' clause to make an assertion less direct.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 委婉表达：be not + 形容词 + that从句
examples: [talking about a town near a dump where people cannot open their windows] I am not certain that they have got used to it.、[talking about distractions while studying] It's not likely that you'll make progress.、As you can see, I'm really in favour of this plan but I'm not sure that the council has anticipated everything.
trigger_lemmas: be not certain、be not sure、be not likely
keywords: 委婉表达,be not,形容词,that从句,间接断言

content: Guideword: USE: 'BE SET TO', ASSERTION. CanDo: Can use 'be set to' to talk about strong assertion about the future, especially in institutional contexts.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 情态表达：be set to 表示对未来事件的强烈断言
examples: The turnover of our company is set to increase dramatically after the establishment of the e-shop, which itself requires little investment.、The population of children is set to plummet to 11.5% and that of working people also to 46.2% in 2050.
trigger_lemmas: be set to、set to、is set to、are set to
keywords: be set to,情态表达,强烈断言,未来预测,机构语境

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: PAST NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'may not have' + '-ed' to talk about possibility in the past.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词may的过去否定形式：may not have + 过去分词
examples: The percentage of Dutch people eating a big, hot breakfast may not have been as high as of English people, but it has certainly reduced.、Apart from the income from both partners, it helps them meet other people thereby aquiring other skills they may not have obtained by staying or working from home.
trigger_lemmas: may not have been、may not have obtained、may not have seen、may not have had
keywords: 情态动词,过去可能性,否定形式,may not have,过去分词

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'MAY WELL'. CanDo: Can use 'may well' to give emphasis to something unexpected.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词强调用法：may well
examples: I think they may well come to an agreement on these payment problems.、In general a week's work experience is a good way for a high school student to get familiar with the world of work. It may well be that after leaving school they become our employees.
trigger_lemmas: may well、it may well be that、may well not
keywords: 情态动词,强调用法,可能性,出人意料,may well

content: Guideword: FORM: PAST, NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'might not have' + '-ed'.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词might的过去否定形式：might not have + 过去分词
examples: First of all, not 45 but only 35 stalls were promised, meaning the disappointment you mentioned might not have been as bad as you, or whoever gave you the information, thought it was.
trigger_lemmas: might not have、might not have been、might not have done
keywords: 情态动词,过去否定形式,不确定性推测,过去分词,复杂句式

content: Guideword: USE: POSSIBILITY IN THE PAST. CanDo: Can use 'might not have' + '-ed' to talk about possibility with a past reference.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词might的过去可能性表达：might not have + 过去分词
examples: The survey, mentioned in the local newspaper yesterday, might not have asked an accurate sample of people.、Even though things might not have gone as you expected or as you would like them to have, we have to remind you we are dealing with charity here.
trigger_lemmas: might not have asked、might not have gone、might not have received
keywords: 情态动词,过去可能性,might not have,过去分词,推测语气

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the question form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词might的疑问句形式：表达可能性推测的提问方式
examples: Could it be possible that your company sent me the wrong bill, or might it be the bill from the last person who lived in my house?、Might it not be a good idea to change the travel company you are working with next time?
trigger_lemmas: might it be、might there be、might we、might it not be
keywords: 情态动词,疑问句,可能性推测,委婉建议,正式语气

content: Guideword: USE: POLITE CRITICISM. CanDo: Can use the question form to make polite criticisms and suggestions.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词might的礼貌批评与建议用法
examples: Last but not least, might it not be wise if you had more trips …?、Also might I suggest that we have more exiting publicity for the club?、As for the musicals running in London, might I suggest that you arrange for seats where one can both see and listen?
trigger_lemmas: might i suggest、might it not be、might we consider
keywords: 情态动词,礼貌批评,疑问句形式,委婉建议,正式场合

content: Guideword: USE: CONSOLING OR JUSTIFYING. CanDo: Can use 'might' followed by 'but' to console or justify.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词might的安慰或辩解用法：might...but结构
examples: The argument that fashion reflects people's attitudes and behaviour might sound superficial, but on closer examination it turns out to be true.、The idea of going to work-out to keep fit might be tedious sometimes but the majority of young people are interested in taking up an activity these days.、All in all, it might not have been a huge success, but people enjoyed themselves.、You might not have been able to "change the world" but maybe you have made a difference to one or two people.
keywords: 情态动词,might,but,安慰,辩解,语用功能

content: Guideword: FORM: PAST, NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'needn't have' + '-ed'.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词need的过去否定式：needn't have + 过去分词
examples: You needn't have bought me anything!、However, you needn't have bothered so much.
trigger_lemmas: needn't have、needn't have bothered、needn't have worried、needn't have gone
keywords: needn't have,过去分词,情态动词,过去否定式,不必要动作

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: DESIRED STATES, WITH 'THERE OUGHT TO BE'. CanDo: Can use 'there ought to be' to talk about desired states of affairs.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词ought to的用法：表达理想状态与'There ought to be'句型
examples: The rooms were dirty, there was no room service and there ought to be a lift since the rooms were on the 4th floor.、… we came to the conclusion that there ought to be some changes to the club’s publicity.、I think there ought to be more excursions and guided tours.
keywords: 情态动词,ought to,理想状态,there ought to be,建议表达

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: EMPHASIS, WITH 'REALLY'. CanDo: Can use 'ought to' with 'really' to add emphasis.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词强调用法：ought to与really连用
examples: Moreover, you really ought to ask for details about the timetable they've set for schooling hours, just to be sure that its fits the with way of studying you are accustomed to.、This is what almost everyone thinks, but we really ought to think a little bit more about it.、One really ought to know the interests, wishes and demands of the receiver.
keywords: ought to,really,情态动词,强调语气,义务建议

content: Guideword: USE: LIKELIHOOD. CanDo: Can use 'ought to' to talk about something which is likely.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词ought to：表示可能性
examples: … the fundamental function of accounting software is to record the numerous ordinary business activities, which may improve the efficiency of the company. Besides, it ought to provide useful information in decision-making.、You ought not to be hungry.
trigger_lemmas: ought to、ought not to、ought to have
keywords: 情态动词,可能性,ought to,合理推测,正式语境

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: PAST, AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'ought to have' + '-ed' to refer to desired states of affairs in the past.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词ought to的过去式用法：ought to have + 过去分词
examples: Another point, which I think ought to have been better managed, was the boat trip on the Thames.、However, the expert that I have consulted claims that this kind of polluted water is the most common consequence when placing gas stations and the government ought to have known that.、We were taken by surprise, when we didn’t get a tour guide. We ought to have booked one!
trigger_lemmas: ought to have、ought to have been、ought to have known
keywords: 情态动词,过去式,ought to have,批评建议,正式表达

content: Guideword: USE: COMMANDS AND INSTRUCTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'shall' to express commands in very formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词shall：正式语境下的命令与指令表达
examples: We therefore need to insist that the agreement is binding and that the contract shall be fulfilled.
trigger_lemmas: shall be、shall have、shall not、it is hereby agreed that
keywords: 情态动词,正式命令,法律义务,合同条款,规章制度

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词shall的否定形式：shall not
examples: This way, students shall not die of boredom or feel that their stay was useless.、Secondly, supplier contracts shall not be omitted.、This is, as I mentioned in my letter, only in the event I shall not be able to pick you up at the airport.
keywords: 情态动词,否定形式,正式语境,禁止,义务否定

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: AFTER 'IF' CLAUSES. CanDo: Can use 'should' after 'if' to talk about possible situations in the future.
chinese_human_name: 条件句中的should：if...should...结构
examples: If you should change your mind and prefer to take a taxi, you can do it outside the airport by calling this number: 3570.、If something should happen, call 112, the local alarm number.
trigger_lemmas: if something should happen、if you should need、if there should be
keywords: 条件句,should,if从句,未来可能,正式语气

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: INVERSION. CanDo: Can use 'should' with an inverted subject to refer to possible situations, in formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: should倒装句：正式语境中的条件假设表达
examples: Should you need any further information, don't hesitate to contact us.、Should you withhold any important information or documentation, this could stop any payment to you.
trigger_lemmas: should you need、should there be、should anything happen、should the situation arise
keywords: should倒装,正式条件句,假设表达,倒装结构,商务英语

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the question form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词used to的疑问句形式
examples: [talking about a change in eating habits] What did we use to eat?
trigger_lemmas: use to、did use to、used to be
keywords: used to,疑问句,过去习惯,情态动词,did use to

content: Guideword: USE: HABITUAL AND TYPICAL. CanDo: Can use 'will' to talk about something which is typical or habitual.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词will：表示典型或习惯性行为
examples: The abundance of ingredients required in any recipe will result normally in a spicy but nutritious dish, a dish that will usually contain some kind of sauce made of hot pepper, tomatoes, garlic and onion, some kind of meat and also some vegetables.、She will often knock on the door to see you.、Go to lots of beautiful places that you won't usually be able to go to with a car, such as riversides.
keywords: 情态动词,习惯性行为,典型特征,频率副词,一般规律

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of adverbs with 'would', including 'strongly', 'easily', 'especially', 'actually', 'absolutely', 'gladly'  ► adverbs
chinese_human_name: 情态动词would与副词搭配：强化表达与修饰
examples: Considering the aspects of our education system, and the results of my research, I would strongly recommend the following changes to be made.、Because of her wide and excellent experience with small children I believe that Nascha would easily fit into a family with small children.
keywords: 情态动词,副词修饰,would strongly,词序规则,C1级别语法

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: RESPONSE TOKENS. CanDo: Can use 'not necessarily' as a short response.
chinese_human_name: 副词短语短回应：not necessarily
examples: Presents. Strips, bows, paper-wrapping. Thinking of Christmas? Not necessarily.
keywords: not necessarily,短回应,副词短语,不一定,委婉否定

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'NOT NECESSARILY'. CanDo: Can use 'not necessarily' to express a possible exception to a general perception, i.e. not in every case.
chinese_human_name: 副词短语：not necessarily（不一定）
examples: As a conclusion, I want to say that while what we wear doesn't necessarily define who we are, it does play a big part in it.、This is not necessarily the way the older generation would see it though.
trigger_lemmas: not necessarily、does not necessarily、is not necessarily、are not necessarily
keywords: not necessarily,副词短语,例外表达,非必然性,精确否定

content: Guideword: USE: CRITICISM. CanDo: Can use 'could have' + '-ed' form to express disapproval or criticism.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词could的批评用法：could have + 过去分词
examples: Since your travel company chose a hotel that far from the city, I think that you could have arranged entertainment at the hotel.、… for the money they had paid, you could have given them a better service (hotel, restaurant and evening entertainment).
keywords: could have,过去分词,批评,责备,未发生行为

content: Guideword: USE: EXPECTATIONS WITH 'MIGHT' OR 'MAY'. CanDo: Can use the future continuous with 'might' or 'may' to talk about an event or activity potentially in progress at a specified or understood time in the future.
chinese_human_name: 将来进行时与情态动词 'might' 或 'may' 的搭配：表达未来可能正在进行的动作
examples: As far as I'm concerned, we should definitely do some additional publicity, particularly for the new offerings which might be coming up.、For example, your boss may be calling at 10 pm asking you to prepare a report for next day's meeting.
keywords: 将来进行时,情态动词,可能性,进行状态,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use the future perfect with adverbs (in the normal mid-position).
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 将来完成时与副词搭配：will have done + 副词
examples: If you have ever read a fairytale by Hans Christian Andersen you will surely have discovered why this man is so famous worldwide.、However, sales will possibly have fallen to 5000 units again by the end of the year.
trigger_lemmas: will possibly have、will surely have、will probably have、by the end of
keywords: 将来完成时,副词,中位位置,by短语,时间从句

content: Guideword: USE: ASSUMPTIONS. CanDo: Can use the future perfect simple with 'will' to make assumptions about the present, particularly with 'you'.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 将来完成时简单式：用will have done表示对现在的推测
examples: As you will have heard, this year's work experience programme in Britain was in general a success.、All of this is because her book will have included the cultural traditions that go with the dishes.
trigger_lemmas: as you will have、by now you will have、will have included、will have heard
keywords: 将来完成时,推测用法,will have done,合理假设,现在指向

content: Guideword: USE: POLITENESS. CanDo: Can use the future perfect simple with 'will' as a politeness strategy, often in formal contexts.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 将来完成时作为礼貌策略：will have + 过去分词
examples: [from a formal letter] I hope I will have reassured you.
trigger_lemmas: i hope i will have、we trust that we will have、by then i will have
keywords: 将来完成时,礼貌策略,正式语境,will have,过去分词

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE 'SHALL'. CanDo: Can use the negative form 'shall not'.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future simple (with will and shall)
chinese_human_name: 将来时否定形式：shall not 的用法
examples: However, we shall not forget to mention the legal and social consequences of such a merger to the average employees.、Therefore, my client shall not release you from the agreement, which is binding upon both parties.
trigger_lemmas: shall not forget、shall not release、shall not disclose、shall not tolerate
keywords: shall not,否定形式,将来时,正式语境,法律用语

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use 'be' + 'going to' with an increasing range of adverbs (particularly adverbs of certainty) in the normal mid position.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future with be going to
chinese_human_name: 将来时be going to与副词搭配：表达确定性的进阶用法
examples: Mario Soares is already an old man, nearly 70, who is probably going to finish his active political life in 2 or 3 years.、As the new store is going to be the first and only one in Moscow, and, to make matters worse, it is going to be located close to our most successful outlet, it is undoubtedly going to have a detrimental effect on our company.、Additionally, many British people stay at "Tall Trees Campsite", so I guess we would be forced to speak English all the time, which is also great because it is surely going to help us to improve our English skills.
trigger_lemmas: probably going to、undoubtedly going to、surely going to、certainly going to
keywords: be going to,副词,确定性副词,将来时,中位位置

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'BY THE TIME'. CanDo: Can use the present simple with 'by the time' to refer to the future.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: present simple for future use
chinese_human_name: 一般现在时表将来：与'by the time'连用
examples: … by the time he gets home, he will just want to go straight to bed.、By the time you arrive the information office at the airport will be closed, as at 11.00 o'clock a full day strike will start.
keywords: by the time,一般现在时,将来时,时间状语从句,时间关系

content: Guideword: USE: SUGGESTIONS, OBLIGATION. CanDo: Can use the present simple after speech act verbs expressing suggestions and obligation.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: present simple for future use
chinese_human_name: 现在时表将来：建议与义务类动词后的用法
examples: We would suggest that our management takes a closer look.、I recommend that we go to the theatre in Ginza where "Miss Saigon" is on.、Moreover, we insist that the agreement between you is legally binding ….
keywords: 现在简单时,言语行为动词,建议动词,义务动词,that从句

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: FIXED EXPRESSIONS, FRONTING. CanDo: Can use fixed expressions in the front position for focus.
chinese_human_name: 固定表达前置：用于强调的句首固定短语
examples: At the end of the day everything is up to you!、All in all, the activity week was a nice experience for both students and teachers.、All things considered, I would recommend the third proposal as it seems to me that it covers most of the points the students have been complaining about.、When it comes down to it, who does not like such a surprise?、When you think about it, can we afford a flat in Central London and still have something left with a basic salary?
trigger_lemmas: at the end of the day、all in all、all things considered、when it comes down to it、when you think about it
keywords: 固定表达,前置,强调,总结,逗号分隔

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'WHAT' CLEFT CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use 'What' + noun or pronoun + verb phrase as subject + 'be', for focus.
chinese_human_name: 强调句型：What引导的强调从句
examples: What we need is a strong publicity campaign, directed at young people.、What everyone loved were the special effects and we were very impressed by the use of advanced technological innovations.、What companies care about is money and football players help them to earn it.、What tourists want is to see the most typical things in England, not a hamburger restaurant or a London musical from the back row in the gallery.、What students learn are mostly facts and theories.、What I found particularly fascinating about this story is that it is still exciting and thrilling, despite the plot being rather easy to follow.
trigger_lemmas: what we need、what everyone loved、what companies care about、what tourists want
keywords: What从句,强调句型,主语从句,焦点结构,be动词单复数

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: IMPERATIVES. CanDo: Can use imperatives as pointing devices within texts for focus.
chinese_human_name: 祈使句作为文本焦点指示器：note、notice、see等动词的强调用法
examples: Note the disadvantages of this transfer.、Notice the difference in the salary. (Ecuador; C1 EFFECTIVE OPERATIONAL PROFICIENCY; 2008; Spanish - Latin American; Pass、See the written instructions on the phone for complete instruction.
keywords: 祈使句,焦点指示器,文本强调,书面语,引导读者

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'WH-'CLEFT CLAUSE, TITLES. CanDo: Can use 'Wh-'cleft clauses as titles or subtitles, to point to something that follows, for focus.
chinese_human_name: Wh-分裂句作标题：聚焦后续内容的表达方式
examples: Why I think this is a good idea、People are sensitive, and when they hear about charities, they always want to help.、Why you should choose that event、If you fund this event, you will gain in two ways: firstly you will help needy people, and secondly you will be admired.、The aim of this is to find out why our biggest customer stopped purchasing from our company.、How I investigated. First I started looking on the internet in general.、How we could benefit in terms of sales、This drink will be taken by athletes of any kind.
trigger_lemmas: why i think、why you should、how to implement、what makes
keywords: Wh-分裂句,标题聚焦,陈述语序,正式文体,逻辑引导

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: NON-FINITE WITH '-ED' CLAUSES. CanDo: Can use a non-finite subordinate clause with an '-ed' form, before a main clause, for focus, often in formal, academic or business contexts.
chinese_human_name: 非谓语-ed从句前置：用于强调的正式表达
examples: Compared to other European capitals, there has been a lot done to make riding a bike less dangerous and more comfortable in Berlin.、Outlined below are some essential reasons which justify my choice and should be seriously considered.
keywords: 非谓语从句,-ed形式,强调结构,正式语境,前置从句

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: TEXTUAL REFERENCE. CanDo: Can use a range of phrases as discourse markers to point to other parts of a text.
category: SuperCategory: DISCOURSE MARKERS. SubCategory: discourse markers in writing
chinese_human_name: 语篇标记语：文本指引用语（如As mentioned above）
examples: As mentioned above, it might be possible to negotiate better contracts for your company.、I hope this brief note has convinced you to start this club. As mentioned earlier, I have already asked for information.、So as shown above, I recommend TELECARS to be our car services supplier because it offers all we need.
trigger_lemmas: as mentioned above、as shown earlier、in summary、as will be discussed
keywords: 语篇标记语,文本引用,连贯性,正式写作,固定搭配

content: Guideword: FORM: 'ONE'S'. CanDo: Can use 'one's' to indicate possession, referring to people in general.
chinese_human_name: 泛指人称所有格：one's的用法
examples: Living in Greece, I have had a chance to realise how much tourism can affect one's life.、After one has spent enough time away from one 's parents and has a personality of one's own, it is definitely possible to move in with one's parents.、In my opinion, this process depends on one's ability to open another way of communicating apart from one's mother language.
keywords: 泛指人称,所有格,正式语境,一致性,one's own

content: Guideword: FORM: 'EITHER', 'NEITHER' + 'OF' + DETERMINER WITH PLURAL NOUNS. CanDo: Can use 'either' and 'neither' + 'of' with plural noun phrases or pronouns.► pronouns
chinese_human_name: 限定词搭配：either/neither + of + 复数名词短语或代词
examples: Either of the measures is recommended and those measures are bound to enhance the company's competitive power.、Of course if you are not at all interested in sports, neither of these games will be of any interest to you.、However, you forgot to add that neither of us could foresee the rise in the price of wheat.
keywords: either,neither,of,复数名词,代词,动词一致性

content: Guideword: USE: HYPERBOLE. CanDo: Can use determiners in hyperbole, often in informal contexts ('millions of', 'loads of', 'tons of').
chinese_human_name: 夸张表达中的数量限定词：millions of, loads of, tons of
examples: My kitchen is absolutely cramped. I love cooking and despite the fact that I have no space, I managed to fit in a table as well as millions of cookbooks and all the necessary kitchen tools.、I'm going to make loads of cookies this year and will give them in nice little boxes to my family and friends.、I received tons of plastic ducks every time I had my birthday or some kind of celebration.
keywords: 夸张表达,数量限定词,非正式语境,millions of,loads of,tons of

content: Guideword: FORM: 'EITHER', 'NEITHER' WITH SINGULAR NOUNS. CanDo: Can use 'either' and 'neither' with singular nouns.
chinese_human_name: 限定词：either和neither与单数名词的搭配使用
examples: Second, we would draw your attention to the fact that neither party could foresee or predict the recent rise in the price of wheat.、In the Czech Republic, somewhere between those two extremes, either way is possible.、This way, the toilet can be accessed easily from either floor.
keywords: either,neither,单数名词,限定词,两者中任一,两者都不

content: Guideword: FORM: 'EITHER … OR'. CanDo: Can use 'either … or' to combine more complex strings of clauses and sentences.
chinese_human_name: 并列连词：either … or 连接复杂从句和句子
examples: And finally, about the present, you have two options; either you get something typical from your country, which they may like because you know how much they like collecting things from all over the world, or I get something from the wedding list store and sent it to them with your name on it and we can sort it out when you arrive here.
trigger_lemmas: either … or、either … or else、either … or rather
keywords: 并列连词,either … or,复杂从句,选择结构,就近原则

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'NOT ONLY … BUT ALSO' WITH INVERSION. CanDo: Can use inverted auxiliary 'do' + the subject after 'not only', to give focus.
chinese_human_name: 倒装结构：not only ... but also 的强调用法
examples: Indeed, not only did they teach us useful knowledge, but they also organised practical exercises to ensure that we had assimilated all the information.、Furthermore, not only do I speak (and write) in fluent English, but I also speak French, Spanish and Portuguese.、For me, not only do extreme sports provide satisfaction of achievement, but they also help you to express yourself.
keywords: not only,but also,倒装,强调,并列连词

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'YET', CONCESSIVE. CanDo: Can use '(and) yet' to combine phrases and clauses to introduce a contrast, often unexpected.
chinese_human_name: 并列连词：'yet'的让步对比用法
examples: In the face of these recent events, our department also reviewed the contract with ProLine International, and found some interesting yet unpleasant details.、This college is famous for its art teachers and very skilled students, and yet it does not have its own gallery.、The host family was carefully selected, yet it was four miles away from school.
keywords: 并列连词,让步对比,意外性,and yet,句型结构

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'NOT ONLY … BUT ALSO'. CanDo: Can use 'not only … but also' to combine phrases and clauses, often for focus or emphasis.
chinese_human_name: 并列连词：not only … but also
examples: This book is not only a guide to the history of music but also a compendium of theory.、In addition to that, if we move to the new premises, we can not only solve the above problems, but also gain other benefits such as a better environment.、If we go back in time we will see that the difference between the old and the modern films is not only the number produced but also the content.
keywords: 并列连词,平行结构,强调,倒装,正式英语

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: FOCUS. CanDo: Can use 'whatever', 'wherever', 'however', etc. as a subordinating conjunction, at the beginning of a sentence, to give focus.
chinese_human_name: 从属连词聚焦用法：whatever、wherever、however等句首强调结构
examples: Whatever you choose, you'll probably have to share it with other people.、Whatever the cause of the fall in the standard of your services is, we would strongly recommend that you take all the necessary measures to make sure that this won't happen again.、Wherever you go, you find shops, hotels and pubs which are full of tourists.、Whoever we appoint, he/she should be a well-qualified, educated and flexible person.
keywords: 从属连词,聚焦用法,句首强调,whatever,wherever,however,whoever,条件从句

content: Guideword: FORM: SUPERLATIVE ADVERB 'BEST' + CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use 'the best' as a superlative adverb + pronoun + ellipted 'can' or 'could'.
chinese_human_name: 最高级副词'the best' + 从句结构：表达尽力而为
examples: I'm sorry to say that she is not the best of cooks but she tries the best she can.、On Thursday I did the best I could.、However, to make sure that we offer the best we can, we would be grateful if you gave us a grant.
trigger_lemmas: the best、do the best、try the best、offer the best
keywords: 最高级副词,省略从句,尽力表达,the best,can/could省略

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'NOT ONLY … BUT (ALSO)' WITH INVERSION, FOCUS. CanDo: Can combine clauses using 'not only' in front position followed by an inverted first clause + … 'but (also)' to introduce the second clause, to give focus.
chinese_human_name: 倒装强调句型：Not only ... but (also) 的倒装用法
examples: And not only did they come for the most popular sports, such as football and basketball, but many other less known activities were very well attended.、Not only was he helpful but the students had the opportunity to watch videos and listen to music.、Not only has the cost improved, but also the value for money.
keywords: 倒装,强调句型,并列从句,not only,but also

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'LET' + THIRD PERSON PRONOUN, PERMISSION, ORDER. CanDo: Can use an imperative clause with  'let' + 'him/her/them' + base form of a main verb, to  give permission or allow something or instruct someone to allow something.
chinese_human_name: 祈使句：'let' + 第三人称代词（他/她/他们）表示允许或指令
examples: Try to play chess with him whenever you can and remember: Let him win!、While in London, they want to do their shopping there, so let them have more free time to do that.、If she wants to study away from home, please, let her go .
keywords: let,第三人称代词,动词原形,允许,指令,祈使句

content: Guideword: USE: POINTING, IN FORMAL CONTEXTS. CanDo: Can use imperatives to point within or to a document within formal contexts, often academic.
chinese_human_name: 祈使句在正式语境中的指示用法
examples: See enclosed brochure.、As you requested in your memo, I have spent the past few days gathering information from the six students involved in our programme (see above).、Look at the graph of the Agricultural sector 1991-2001.
keywords: 祈使句,正式语境,指示用法,学术写作,商务文档

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: DON'T 'LET' + PRONOUN, PERMISSION, ORDER. CanDo: Can use an imperative clause with  'let' + 'him/her/them' + base form of a main verb, to disallow something or instruct someone to disallow something.
chinese_human_name: 祈使句否定结构：Don't let + 代词 + 动词原形
examples: Don't let them spend all their free time in front of the TV.、Don't let him go out alone, because he may not feel well.
keywords: 祈使句,否定结构,使役动词,第三人称代词,动词原形,禁止表达,间接指令

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: IMPERATIVE + 'AND' CONDITIONAL. CanDo: Can use imperatives to introduce a condition followed by 'and' to introduce a consequence of the condition.
chinese_human_name: 祈使句+and条件句：表达条件与结果的简洁结构
examples: See one of them and you'll want to see them all.
keywords: 祈使句,条件句,and连接,条件结果关系,简洁表达

content: Guideword: FORM: NON-FINITE AFTER 'IF'. CanDo: Can use non-finite clauses after 'if'. .► 'clauses: conditionals'
chinese_human_name: 条件句中的非谓语从句：if后接非谓语动词结构
examples: Please do not hesitate to ask for further assistance if needed.、Finally, there are some suggestions that, if taken, could improve the schools' academic standards.、There are plenty of taxis, of course, but they are very expensive, if compared with London taxis.
keywords: 非谓语动词,条件句,简化结构,分词,不定式

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: NON-FINITE WITH '-ED' CLAUSES, FOCUS. CanDo: Can use a non-finite subordinate clause with an '-ed' form, before a main clause, to give focus.
chinese_human_name: 非谓语-ed从句前置：强调信息焦点
examples: Compared to the campsite job this one has its advantages.、Based on the assessment above, I strongly recommend that we should take some action to improve the store.、Given all the inconveniences explained above I expect compensation from your company and if I do not hear from you within ten days I will have to contact my solicitors and take further steps.、Based in Zurich with departments all over Europe we reach almost 150 million people.
keywords: 非谓语从句,-ed分词,信息焦点,前置结构,逻辑主语

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: INVERSION. CanDo: Can introduce a subordinate clause with inverted 'should/had/were' + subject + verb, in formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 正式语境中的倒装条件从句：should/had/were + 主语 + 动词
examples: Should you need any further assistance, do not hesitate to contact me.、Had we known that before we could have taken more money with us.、Were I able to travel to any place and time, I would probably choose the Greece of more than two thousand years ago.
keywords: 倒装条件从句,正式语境,虚拟语气,should/had/were,词序倒装

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'NOT' + '-ING' CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use a non-finite clause, introduced by 'not' + '-ing', to give more information.
chinese_human_name: 非谓语从句：'not' + '-ing' 结构
examples: Not knowing the North of London very well it took me quite a long time to get there.、A nine-member family living peacefully in 19th-century England is suddenly shocked by the untimely death of the mother. Not having accepted his wife's death, the father, George, deeply depressed, is left alone to raise his seven children.
keywords: 非谓语从句,现在分词,逻辑主语,状语功能,否定结构

content: Guideword: FORM: ELLIPTED 'IF' CLAUSE. CanDo: Can form ellipted 'if' clauses with 'if' + '-ed' form.
chinese_human_name: 省略if的条件从句：if + -ed形式
examples: Furthermore I found little rooms where an employee could take a short nap if needed.、Meals are served, if requested, three times a day, unless picnic lunches are needed.、Women who want to start a career more often decide to be single or, if married, don't devote much time to the family.
keywords: 省略if从句,条件从句,过去分词,正式书面语,插入语

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'IF' + PAST PERFECT + MODAL VERBS IMAGINED SITUATION, REGRET. CanDo: Can form conditional subordinate clauses with if + the past perfect simple and modal verb + 'have' + '-ed' in the main clause, to talk about imagined situations in the past, often with regret.
chinese_human_name: 过去虚拟条件句：if + 过去完成时 + 情态动词have done（表达对过去的假设与遗憾）
examples: All this could have been avoided, if the plan had been more flexible.、Several statements in the newspaper could have been avoided, if the writer had taken notice of the income results which were sent along with the other facts from the charity day.、However, I think I could have learned more if more individual tuition had been available.、I wrote this article referring to my own experience in London, hence I might have had a different opinion if I had gone to another city or country.
keywords: 过去虚拟条件句,过去完成时,情态动词have done,假设与遗憾,与过去事实相反

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'IF' + 'SHOULD', FORMAL, POLITE. CanDo: Can form subordinate conditional clauses with 'if you should', in polite, formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 正式礼貌条件从句：'if you should' 结构
examples: If you should have any concerns about my choice, please tell me.、If you should have any problems, you can go to an information booth and you will be told which train you have to take to Hassau.、If you should get lost, don't hesitate to call us.、If you should have any further questions do not hesitate to contact us.
trigger_lemmas: if you should、should have、should need、should require
keywords: 条件从句,正式语气,礼貌表达,should,if 从句

content: Guideword: FORM: INVERTED CONDITIONAL CLAUSE, 'SHOULD'. CanDo: Can introduce a conditional subordinate clause with 'should' + inverted subject.
chinese_human_name: 条件从句倒装结构：'Should'引导的虚拟条件句
examples: Should you require any further information about the program or any other detail please do not hesitate to ask for it.、Should there be a lack of mutual understanding a break-up is unavoidable.
keywords: 倒装条件从句,should引导,虚拟条件,正式语气,省略if

content: Guideword: USE: CERTAINTY. CanDo: Can use a wide range of adverbs to indicate degrees of certainty.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 副词表达确定性程度：从probably到undoubtedly
examples: It was undoubtedly an unforgettable experience.、Television programms are undeniably a way of keeping ourselves well-informed and open to a special knowledge of every aspect of our lives.、I bought a skirt, a pair of jeans and a white dress, because I absolutely need new clothes for your party!
keywords: 副词,确定性,程度,probably,undoubtedly,absolutely,certainly,possibly

content: Guideword: USE: STANCE. CanDo: Can use a wide range of stance adverbs (simply, truly, surely, apparently, naturally, surprisingly, inevitably, literally, exceptionally, frankly, clearly, amazingly, wisely, admittedly) to indicate an attitude or viewpoint, often in clause initial position.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 立场副词：表达态度与观点的副词用法
examples: Obviously everybody has the right to be on a strike.、We can't truly blame ourselves for this unlucky beginning.、Apparently someone made a mistake writing the details I gave over the phone.、Naturally , I inclined towards the second option.、Luckily for me, I stayed with a kind and helpful host family but they lived four miles from the school.
keywords: 立场副词,态度表达,句首位置,主观评价,语境适配

content: Guideword: USE: DEGREE, WITH ADJECTIVES. CanDo: Can use a wide range of adverbs with adjectives to express degree or intensity.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 副词修饰形容词：程度与强度表达
examples: It deals with the friendship between two completely different men.、It is extremely important that the project is finished before September.、The last thing I would like to mention is that you have lost a single passenger's luggage three times, which is totally unacceptable.
keywords: 程度副词,强度表达,副词修饰,形容词修饰,语体差异

content: Guideword: FORM: DEGREE, MODIFYING COMPARATIVES. CanDo: Can use degree adverbs ('slightly', 'a bit', 'much') to modify comparatives.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs as modifiers
chinese_human_name: 程度副词修饰比较级：slightly、a bit、much的用法
examples: My Spanish is slightly more fluent than my English, because I lived in Spain longer than in England.、It will be a bit more expensive than the bus but it's safer and quicker.、Despite all the controversies between these two generations, the grandchildren shouldn't forget that their grandparents are much more experienced.
trigger_lemmas: slightly more、a bit more、much more、slightly less、a bit less、much less
keywords: 程度副词,比较级,slightly,a bit,much,修饰比较级,程度差异

content: Guideword: FORM: DEGREE, MODIFYING ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of degree adverbs to modify a range of adverb types. ► adjectives ► adverb phrases: form
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs as modifiers
chinese_human_name: 程度副词修饰各类副词：提升表达精准度
examples: The attitude of young people today towards keeping fit and healthy has almost completely changed.、Moreover, making use of some techniques I practised in the How to Negotiate classes is something which happens to me quite frequently.、The mobile market is growing incredibly fast in Britain and your company is leading this process.、Recently, the charity organised a fun-raising day, which went  reasonably well .
keywords: 程度副词,修饰关系,副词短语,语义协调,词序固定

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: ADVERB + 'ENOUGH'. CanDo: Can post-modify adverbs with 'enough to intensify'.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverb phrases - form
chinese_human_name: 副词短语：副词+enough的强调用法
examples: Surprisingly enough, Meal's management was very responsive.、Sadly enough, I wasn't able to find any job proposals for us myself, so I'll just have to speculate on the results of your work.、Luckily enough, we have a garden where we can cook over an open fire, and as the temperatures in June are rather enjoyable here in Sweden, it actually works.
keywords: 副词短语,后置修饰,enough,强调用法,情感表达

content: Guideword: FORM: ADVERB + ADVERB. CanDo: Can modify a wide range of adverbs with other adverbs.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverb phrases - form
chinese_human_name: 副词短语结构：副词修饰副词
examples: Even the beautiful, attractive cover and the extra Audio CD aren’t enough to justify the slightly higher price, especially because the value of this game will drop extremely rapidly.、Firstly, we should get some TV airtime, to catch the attention of a large number of people effectively and achieve a substantial market penetration relatively quickly.
keywords: 副词修饰副词,程度副词,方式副词,副词短语,extremely rapidly

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: ADVERBS + PREPOSITIONAL PHRASES, HIGHLIGHT. CanDo: Can post-modify adverbs with a complex prepositional phrase complement, to highlight information.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverb phrases - form
chinese_human_name: 副词后置修饰：副词+复杂介词短语补语
examples: Luckily for you, I kept notes on everything we did, so I proudly present to you the top 4 of our course-days.、Unfortunately for some of them, the "holiday of their dreams" turned out to be rather nightmarish.、Especially in the period of 1999-2001, it shot up from 5 points to 7 points.、Probably in the next ten or more years, the engineering profession will be as much respected as it used to be twenty years ago.
keywords: 副词后置修饰,介词短语补语,突出信息,复杂结构,正式语境

content: Guideword: FORM: COMPOUND ADJECTIVES. CanDo: Can use a wide range of compound adjectives ('open-minded', 'above-mentioned', 'well-to-do', 'jaw-dropping')
chinese_human_name: 复合形容词：open-minded、above-mentioned等组合用法
examples: I would describe myself as an easy-going and open-minded person.、…we suggest investing a certain amount of money in the above-mentioned technical devices in order to achieve the financial target.、But as she does not live in a well-to-do family, Ola was never able to afford additional private lessons, for example.、If anyone has ever seen it, they would agree with me that it was THE most jaw-dropping road in the world.
keywords: 复合形容词,连字符,定语,过去分词,正式写作

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH EXTREME ADVERBS. CanDo: Can modify gradable adjectives with extreme adverbs of degree ('absolutely', 'extremely', 'incredibly', 'totally') to intensify their meaning.
chinese_human_name: 程度副词强化可分级形容词：absolutely, extremely, incredibly, totally
examples: I am absolutely sure that it will attract even more attention.、Nowadays, it is extremely difficult to imagine how workers lived ten years ago, especially because of the incredibly fast evolution in technology.、I would make a totally new programme, in which the following points must be improved: …
keywords: 极端程度副词,可分级形容词,强化意义,absolutely,extremely,incredibly,totally

content: Guideword: FORM: PAST PARTICPLE AS ADJECTIVE. CanDo: Can use the '–ed' form of a verb as an adjective, after a noun.
chinese_human_name: 过去分词作形容词：名词后置用法
examples: First of all, I would recommend providing a wider range of films and introducing discussions after each film shown.、It is believed that if some improvements are made, the club will live up to the high standards required .
keywords: 过去分词,形容词,名词后置,被动语态,完成状态

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH NOUN AND POSTMODFIER. CanDo: Can use a postmodifier to make the superlative stronger in the structure superlative + postmodifier + noun.
chinese_human_name: 最高级强化结构：最高级 + 后置修饰语 + 名词
examples: What is more, in order to increase sales of the new model to the highest possible level, the possibility of entering the Asian markets should be considered.、I am fond of the idea of working in Central London. It absolutely is the best possible location , I cannot deny that.、It is not the shortest possible route, but the easiest for people with luggage.
keywords: 最高级,后置修饰语,possible,强化表达,正式语体

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH POSTMODFIER AND NOUN. CanDo: Can use a postmodifier to make the superlative stronger, in the structure superlative + noun + postmodifier ('possible', 'ever', 'by far').
chinese_human_name: 最高级强化结构：最高级+名词+后置修饰语（possible/ever/by far）
examples: … we want to present ourselves in the best way possible.、…this cleansing gel will definitely produce good results in the shortest time possible.、Achieving health by using her common sense and having fun while doing it is probably her greatest performance ever and, if elected, she could share that with the world.
keywords: 最高级,后置修饰语,possible,ever,by far,强化语气,词序
